title: scheidweileria parviflora
intro: Scheidweileria parviflora, also known as the Scheidweileria plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to have various medicinal properties, including the ability to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Scheidweileria parviflora include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
